config.changelog: v2 (2026-07-23): hardened after the ibm_marrakesh dress rehearsal (research/results/blind_benchmark_hardware_rehearsal) produced 1 false positive on 4 nulls (0.25 FP rate): null instance 6's off-signal <XY> correlator hit z=4.17 vs the v1 frozen z_gate=3.78. Root cause: the v1 statistic scanned all 8 off-null Pauli pairs, but the device median readout error (0.99%, ~8x the dry-run assumption) inflates the off-signal noise floor. Fix 1 (signal-subspace decision): restrict the decision family to the 2 first-order-signal correlators {YX, ZX} (Bonferroni over 2, not 8). Fix 2 (device-aware gate): recalibrate z_gate for the readout assignment error (z_gate = z_gate_shot / (1-2 eps)^2) instead of the dry-run negligible-readout assumption, preserving the Step-1 power target.
